description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a white brick exterior and a simple, rectangular footprint. The house features a detached garage on one side, with a driveway leading up to it and a beige car parked outside. The front yard is covered with a green lawn, while the backyard is enclosed by a brown wooden fence. Multiple windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The roof over the main house is flat, while the garage has a gable roof, and the entryway is straightforward with a single door and no porch or overhang.
description: A two-story white brick house with a detached garage, green lawn, and fenced backyard, featuring symmetrical windows and a flat main roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage with gable roof, driveway, parked car, and green lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the green lawn, and the start of the backyard fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, symmetrical window arrangement, and flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, parked car, and the transition from front yard to backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single-door entry with no porch or overhang, flush with the facade
